sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87496" key="proqalh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προθᾰλής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">θάλλω</etym>) <sense id="n87496.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">early growing, precocious,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">h.Cer.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">241</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
